features.label: Dedicated YouTube Session
features.desc: YouTube now runs in a separate Electron session (persist:youtube) with its own webRequest interceptor. Ad requests are blocked at network level — YouTube sees a network error, not an ad blocker. No detection possible.
features.howto: Enable in Settings → YouTube → Ad Blocker. Open YouTube in a new tab for session to take effect.

features.label: Ad Video Content Blocking
features.desc: Ad video URLs are identified by specific parameters (ctier=L, oad=1, adformat=) and blocked before loading. IMA SDK is intentionally allowed to load — blocking it triggers YouTube's detection system.
features.howto: Works automatically when YouTube Ad Blocker is enabled.

features.label: Auto Skip + Overlay Hide
features.desc: Skip button is automatically clicked when available. Ad module (.ytp-ad-module), overlay banner (.ytp-ad-overlay-slot), and companion/sponsored cards are hidden instantly via MutationObserver.

features.label: Settings → YouTube Section Updated
features.desc: YouTube settings section updated to reflect the new 2-layer approach: Session Network Block + Auto Skip. Info note added explaining that YouTube must be opened in a new tab after enabling.

features.label: Blocklist → YouTube Ad Blocker Card Updated
features.desc: Blocklist panel YouTube card updated with new layer badges and info note. Removed redundant speed toggle — only speed selector remains.
features.howto: Settings → Blocklists → YouTube Ad Blocker section.

features.label: FOUC Fix — Assistant & DevHub
features.desc: Assistant CSS is now loaded in <head> instead of dynamically injected. Eliminates the flash of unstyled content on app startup where DevHub and Assistant content briefly appeared without styles.
features.howto: App startup is now visually clean — no more unstyled flash.

features.label: analyze.py root path hardcoded
features.desc: analyze.py had a hardcoded absolute path (C:\Users\HARIPADA\...). Fixed to use Path(__file__).parent.parent for automatic root detection — works on any machine.

features.label: YouTube settings section crash
features.desc: YoutubeUI was not defined error after settings update — duplicate code left in file after partial replacement. File rewritten cleanly.
